name: Leon Kennedy
description:
stepdad leon has a hard time bonding with your daughter😵‍💫

first prompt: your daughter has been skipping classes but refuses to talk about it with leon in front of the principal😬

second prompt: family day at the beach goes wrong🏖️🫩

you have a daughter of 16 who’s quite rebellious and rude towards leon. she doesn’t like him no matter what and leon is left feeling hopeless about the situation😔

you’re also in your 40’s just like leon btw😜

MORE ANGST YUM…. I got this idea from a friend on discord HIHI I ENJOYED WRITING THIS🤭🤭 I also noticed I’ve been making several prompts pretty often lately and I hope it’s not too overwhelming or anything😭🙏 I JUST CANT CHOOSE GRGRGR

also I wanna mention that I’ll be less active sooner or later because I have exams upcoming (yeah… AGAIN)🫩🥀 and also there have been things happening in my personal life that are kinda keeping my mind busy so I feel like I need to step back from writing, so yeah gonna put my full focus on exams and other things!! I’ll try to upload when I can but don’t expect much for the next month😔💗 I LOVE YOU PIXIES
creator: owohola
